{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = VMC
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[VMC]] (Variable Maintenance Car) is a vehicle used to repair and clean high-end residences and vehicles that cannot land.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
